tasks.task: Add better error states and feedback when loading queues fails in `QueuesPage.tsx`.
Implement drag and drop reordering for tasks within groups and across groups using `@dnd-kit`.
Build a central `WorkspacePage.tsx` to overview all active projects, recent agent activities, and quick actions, acting as the main entry point for a session.
Add workspace-specific state in Zustand (e.g. `useWorkspaceStore`) to manage current project context, loaded schemas, and workspace-level preferences.
Implement the global hotkey (e.g., Ctrl+Shift+N) for a floating quick-note/snippet window as described in TODO.md.
Replace custom dropdowns in BranchPicker and SourcePicker with a standard Radix DropdownMenu component for consistency (from TODO.md).
Go through `jules-sdk-api with overvewi.md` and expose missing SDK methods via IPC. Add handler in `handlers.ts`, type in `sdk-ipc.ts`, and call in `bridge.ts`.
Implement robust rendering for `MediaArtifact` across formats (image/png, image/gif, video/mp4) in both the inline chat feed and sidebar, replacing the current only approach.
Replace current diff library with `diff-match-patch` compiled to WASM to improve rendering of large Jules patch outputs.
Add `web-tree-sitter` for proper AST parsing in snippet/code editors, running entirely in the renderer without IPC.
Expand croner capabilities in `scheduler.ts`: Expose windowed, weekly, and monthly schedules in UI; implement per-job enable/disable; wire up snooze functionality.
Standardize notification styling and sound handling across `notification-preload.ts`, `notification.ts`, and renderer library. Fix debounce for fired scheduler items.
